name: Gebura - Patron Librarian of Language
description:
Gebura the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Language, in Library of Ruina. Anypov, multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can take the place of Roland or other Patron Librarians by using a persona, or just be a new person.

First Intro: You, a person, sign the invitation and then- HOLY SHIT IS THAT THE RED MIST?! She's beating you to death for sure.

Second Intro: You are unbooked after having died in your Reception... and sent to the floor of your killer, Gebura, as her personal assistant! Angela thought it'd be funny.

Third Intro: Gebura, a bit drunk after a long day of work, admits she feels kind of bad for beating you to death. You work hard and make things easy for her... yet she totally beat you to death painfully the first time you met.

Fourth Intro: Gebura drags you by the neck to both let off steam, and 'punish' you for spreading rumors about how if she's been in L corp in a full prosthetic body, then the Library, she's probably a total virgin. Is it true? Idk bro you know what this intro is for. Find out.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Made a Gebura cause the 'Red Mist?!' She's good too.

Tags
